title: [Feature] Support IOC, FOK, GTC, and Stop order types
body:
## Current State

Only two order types are supported: Limit and Market. Real exchanges support several more time-in-force and conditional order types.

## Proposed Order Types

### Time-in-Force

| Type | Behavior |
|------|----------|
| **GTC** (Good-Till-Cancelled) | Rests in book until filled or cancelled. Current limit order behavior. |
| **IOC** (Immediate-or-Cancel) | Fill as much as possible immediately, cancel the rest. Never rests in book. |
| **FOK** (Fill-or-Kill) | Fill the entire quantity immediately or cancel entirely. All-or-nothing. |
| **GTD** (Good-Till-Date) | Like GTC but with an expiry timestamp. |

### Conditional Orders

| Type | Behavior |
|------|----------|
| **Stop-Market** | Becomes a market order when the last trade price reaches the stop price. |
| **Stop-Limit** | Becomes a limit order when the last trade price reaches the stop price. |

Stop orders require tracking the last trade price per symbol and a trigger mechanism.

## Implementation Notes

- Add a `TimeInForce` field to the Order struct
- IOC: after matching, discard remaining instead of adding to book
- FOK: before matching, check if total available liquidity >= order quantity
- Stop orders: maintain a separate stop order list, check triggers after each trade

## Priority
Medium — significant feature expansion.
